TextView.android:text:
Exercise Routine

1. Morning Yoga
15 minutes of gentle stretches and breathing exercises to wake up your body.

2. Jumping Jacks
3 sets of 20 reps to boost your heart rate and energy.

3. Push-Ups
3 sets of 10-15 reps to strengthen your chest and arms.

4. Squats
3 sets of 15 reps for leg and core strength.

5. Plank
Hold for 30-60 seconds to improve core stability.

6. Lunges
3 sets of 12 reps per leg for lower body strength.

7. Mountain Climbers
3 sets of 20 reps to increase stamina and cardio.

8. Stretching
5-10 minutes to relax muscles and prevent injury.

9. Brisk Walk or Jog
20-30 minutes for overall fitness and circulation.

10. Cool Down Breathing
5 minutes of deep breathing and relaxation to end the session.
